creator: dpostolov@yandex.ru
text: In my case in FreeBSD 13.0-BETA1 and 13.0-BETA2, Xfce 4.16 the problem with the "arrow up" does not appear by default settings with US and RUS keyboard layout. Xfce 4.16 is installed from the "quarterly" packages repository. PCs: Acer Revo Box RN86, Acer Aspire XC-895, Logitech K120 Keyboards.
